title: cymbidium × gongshanense
intro: Cymbidium × gongshanense, also known as Gongshan cymbidium, is a hybrid orchid species resulting from the cross between Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium sinense. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, due to the presence of alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cymbidium × gongshanense include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and is also used in herbal preparations such as capsules and extracts.
